usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: No water at all....according to the due to low pressure but must have plan B - provide water by hook or crook....
comments.reviewTitle: checkin morning ..very little water and after really water TOTALLY NIL..we were checked out and chec

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The staff were very helpful and accomodating. When i got to the hotel it was late afternoon and as it had nothing around it i asked about food the young lady took me on her scooter to get food and then to the ATM. However the room was full mosquitos which had to be sprayed then it was fine. The bathroom was smelly, the bed uncomfortable. Not a pleasant stay. I was only there because i had flown to Banda Aceh to get the get ferry to Pulua Weh, i have since learned that u can fly in and out of Pulua Weh  by plane.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is nice, I have paid much more for less. Staff nice. Location near some restaurants and quick taxi to boat, airport, or sites. I would stay there again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 旅馆位于一个很偏的地方，周围都是杂草，房间里面味道很大，最差的是没有热水就算了，居然连冷水都是间断性供应，晚上洗澡没水，接待室也没人，早上洗漱也没水，找到了人，来了一点水。订单内写着有早餐，但实际没有。目前出差这么久，住的体验最差的旅馆。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: lokasi nya agak kedalam tapi untuk kebersihan baik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Tempatnya bagus, dan pelayanannya baik, tempatnya jgak nyaman, sedikit jauh dari pusat kota, tpi cocok buat kalian yg mungkin ada kegiatan di daerah kampus, krena dekat dgan beberapa kampus ternama yang ada di aceh.
